description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Packages that runs on pull requests, pushes to main, and published releases. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job with a matrix strategy to build Debian packages for debian-unstable, ubuntu-jammy, and ubuntu-focal. For each distribution, checkout the code, determine the Launchpad PPA, generate a Debian changelog, build the package, and upload the artifact. Then, conditionally upload the package to Launchpad PPAs based on the event type and distribution.
